funFacts: Athletes like gymnasts and racers require immense coordination, core strength, and split-second focus.
Designed for Easy difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing clean borders and line work using acrylic or light watercolors.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about geometric symmetry and relaxing design while developing fine motor coordination.
